Extract contract document fields.

fieldSchema.name: Sanitized
fieldSchema.description: Automated contract processing with customizable intelligence that supports field extraction and generation tailored to your business needs.

ReferenceName.description: Name used throughout the contract as reference to the legal party

ExecutionDate.description: Date when the agreement was fully signed and agreed upon by all parties

EffectiveDate.description: Date when the contract starts to be in effect

ExpirationDate.description: Date when the contract ends to be in effect

RenewalDate.description: Date when the contract needs to be renewed by

items.description: A location of the court agreed by both parties where any arising dispute out of or in connection with the agreement should be filed

value.description: Extract various content and layout elements such as words, paragraphs, and tables from documents.

Summary.description: A one-paragraph description of the document.

value.description: Analyze images to generate descriptions.

Summary.description: A one-paragraph description of the image.

value.description: Extract invoice document fields.

CustomerName.description: The full name of the customer, including the primary company name and associated identifiers such as C/O (Care Of), BU# (Business Unit number), ATTN: (Attention to), department names, or other relevant details if existing.

InvoiceId.description: The unique identifier of the invoice, often named 'Invoice Number'

CustomerAddressRecipient.description: The recepient of customer addresss, including the recepient and associated identifiers such as C/O (Care Of), BU# (Business Unit number), ATTN: (Attention to), department names, or other relevant details if existing. Ensure that all parts related to the customer’s recepient identification are included to provide complete context.

BillingAddress.description: The explicit billing address of the customer.

ShippingAddress.description: The explicit shipping address of the customer.

PreviousUnpaidBalance.description: Explicit previously unpaid balance. Please make sure it is **unpaid**, not the total amount of the previous invoice.

RemittanceAddress.description: The explicit address to which the payment or remittance should be sent.

ServiceAddress.description: The explicit address where the service was provided.

VendorTaxId.description: The government ID number associated with the vendor

CustomerTaxId.description: The government ID number associated with the customer

TaxDetails.description: The tax details of the invoice.

TotalPrice.description: The total amount of the line item.

ProductCode.description: Product code, product number, or SKU associated with the specific line item

TaxAmount.description: The tax amount of the line item.

UnitPrice.description: The net or gross price of one unit of the item
